'''yokafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyeglassed|eyeglassed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyeglassed|eyeglassed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yokafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokafithi|yokafithi]] || [[word:yokafiji|yokafiji]] || [[word:yokafishi|yokafishi]] || [[word:yokafiki|yokafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokafuthuthu|yokafuthuthu]] || [[word:yokafujuju|yokafujuju]] || [[word:yokafushushu|yokafushushu]] || [[word:yokafukuku|yokafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokafuthu|yokafuthu]] || [[word:yokafuju|yokafuju]] || [[word:yokafushu|yokafushu]] || [[word:yokafuku|yokafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokafufthuf|yokafufthuf]] || [[word:yokafufjuf|yokafufjuf]] || [[word:yokafufshuf|yokafufshuf]] || [[word:yokafufkuf|yokafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokafethe|yokafethe]] || [[word:yokafeje|yokafeje]] || [[word:yokafeshe|yokafeshe]] || [[word:yokafeke|yokafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokafothotho|yokafothotho]] || [[word:yokafojojo|yokafojojo]] || [[word:yokafoshosho|yokafoshosho]] || [[word:yokafokoko|yokafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokafotho|yokafotho]] || [[word:yokafojo|yokafojo]] || [[word:yokafosho|yokafosho]] || [[word:yokafoko|yokafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokafofthof|yokafofthof]] || [[word:yokafofjof|yokafofjof]] || [[word:yokafofshof|yokafofshof]] || [[word:yokafofkof|yokafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfthÃŸf|yokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfjÃŸf|yokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfshÃŸf|yokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfkÃŸf|yokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yokafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yokafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yokafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yokafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfthÃŸf|yokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfjÃŸf|yokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfshÃŸf|yokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfkÃŸf|yokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfthÃŸf|yokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfjÃŸf|yokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfshÃŸf|yokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokafÃŸfkÃŸf|yokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokafÃḊthÃḊ|yokafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yokafÃḊjÃḊ|yokafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yokafÃḊshÃḊ|yokafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yokafÃḊkÃḊ|yokafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokafathatha|yokafathatha]] || [[word:yokafajaja|yokafajaja]] || [[word:yokafashasha|yokafashasha]] || [[word:yokafakaka|yokafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokafatha|yokafatha]] || [[word:yokafaja|yokafaja]] || [[word:yokafasha|yokafasha]] || [[word:yokafaka|yokafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokafafthaf|yokafafthaf]] || [[word:yokafafjaf|yokafafjaf]] || [[word:yokafafshaf|yokafafshaf]] || [[word:yokafafkaf|yokafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yokafasha|yokafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokafshÃḋsha|yokafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokafrosha|yokafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokafmusha|yokafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokafyasha|yokafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokafnkshÃḋsha|goyokafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokafnkrosha|goyokafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokafnkmusha|goyokafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokafnkyasha|goyokafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yokakafasha|yokakafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokakafshÃḋsha|yokakafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokakafrosha|yokakafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokakafmusha|yokakafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokakafyasha|yokakafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokakafnkshÃḋsha|goyokakafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokakafnkrosha|goyokakafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokakafnkmusha|goyokakafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokakafnkyasha|goyokakafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yekÃḊfasha|yekÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yekÃḊfshÃḋsha|yekÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yekÃḊfrosha|yekÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yekÃḊfmusha|yekÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yekÃḊfyasha|yekÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyekÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|goyekÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyekÃḊfnkrosha|goyekÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyekÃḊfnkmusha|goyekÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyekÃḊfnkyasha|goyekÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yokfafasha|yokfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokfafshÃḋsha|yokfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokfafrosha|yokfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokfafmusha|yokfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokfafyasha|yokfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokfafnkshÃḋsha|goyokfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokfafnkrosha|goyokfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokfafnkmusha|goyokfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokfafnkyasha|goyokfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
